name: Daishi Hokuetsu Financial Group, Inc.
summary: Daishi Hokuetsu Financial Group, Inc., through its subsidiaries, provides various banking products and services in Japan. The company offers deposit products, such as current accounts, savings accounts, savings deposits, notice deposits, term deposits, separate deposits, tax reserve deposits, non-residents' yen deposits, certificates of deposit, foreign currency deposits, and time deposits; loans, including note loans, certificate loans, and overdrafts. It also engages in buying and selling government bonds and other public bonds; invests in government bonds, land bonds, bonds, stocks, and other securities; provision of remittance, transfer, and cash collection, and bills of exchange services; and forex business comprising export, import, foreign remittance and other foreign exchange businesses. In addition, the company offers securities, credit cards and credit guarantee, venture capital and consulting, general leasing, computer related, and HR consulting services, as well as survey research and information provision related to the economy and society. The company was founded in 1873 and is headquartered in Niigata, Japan.
